title: PhoenixSMP
description: A modpack created for a private server.
body:
# **🪄 PhoenixSMP Modpack: Vanilla++ Experience**  
Experience Minecraft's soul amplified! Our carefully curated modpack enhances the vanilla foundation with three magical pillars:

## **⚙️ Create 0.6 & Addons**  
- Industrial elegance with rotating cogs & kinetic machinery  
- Seamless automation that feels *native* to Minecraft  
- Chisel & Bits integration for microscopic detailing  
- New processing chains with Create: Crafts & Additions  

## **📜 Ars Nouveau**  
- Subtle spellcasting that complements tech progression  
- Automate magic with enchanting glyph systems  
- Visually stunning effects that respect vanilla aesthetics  
- No overpowered gear - balanced progression only  

## **🌿 Vanilla++ Ecosystem**  
- Tectonic terrain for natural beauty  
- Supplementaries for quality-of-life enhancements  
- Visual parity with default textures
- Performance-optimized for buttery SMP gameplay  

No mod bloat - just 175 purposeful mods that interlock like redstone components! Perfect for players who believe constraints breed creativity.
